acceptance_test_after_port: index.html opens with no missing local script paths.
Run node scripts/check_world1_slice1_surface.js and confirm expected keys are present.

Defeat one mochi and verify aloe increases.
No intentional gameplay behavior changes observed in Slice 1 path.
